title: splice()
subtitle: Modify an array from within
goal: Learn to remove or insert elements within an array using splice().
explanation: You can use it to remove elements.
It can also insert new elements.
splice() is one of the most powerful array methods.

analogy.title: Analogy
analogy.text: Imagine a list of students. You can remove a student from the middle of the list or insert a new student in their place.

mistake.title: Common mistake
mistake.text: Beginners often confuse slice() with splice(). slice() creates a copy, while splice() changes the original array.
